overall.description: A cinematic night scene from a video game showing a futuristic urban plaza surrounded by neon-lit skyscrapers. Two giant holographic fish, one cyan-blue and one orange-red, swim gracefully in a circular pattern above a busy intersection with light trails from traffic below.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic urban plaza with holographic displays and circular traffic intersection

events.description: the blue holographic fish completes a half-circle around the plaza, beginning to move toward the left side of the frame

agents.ego_description: stationary aerial drone observing the holographic display and traffic patterns below

entered.detail: large cyan-blue glowing holographic koi fish swimming in circular pattern above the plaza
large orange-red glowing holographic koi fish swimming behind the blue fish
tall skyscraper with prominent red PETROCHEM signage at the top
circular intersection with multiple lanes and glowing traffic light trails from moving vehicles
vertical array of colorful illuminated advertisements on building facades
tall modern buildings with illuminated windows and vertical neon strip lighting

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a futuristic city plaza at night, dominated by a massive blue holographic fish swimming in the center foreground. An orange holographic fish glows in the background near the PETROCHEM tower. Below, traffic creates light trails around the circular intersection while neon billboards illuminate the surrounding glass skyscrapers.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic urban plaza with holographic displays and circular traffic intersection

events.description: the orange holographic fish moves into the foreground, passing in front of the blue fish which retreats to the left side

agents.ego_description: maintaining stationary aerial perspective as the holographic fish complete their circular swimming pattern

segments.scene_description: The orange holographic fish moves into the dominant foreground position, its glowing fins filling the center of the frame as it swims past the camera. The blue fish retreats to the left side of the plaza, continuing its circular path. The PETROCHEM tower remains visible in the background while traffic continues to flow below, maintaining the cyberpunk atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a futuristic night plaza as the focus shifts between two massive holographic fish swimming in a circular orbit. It begins with a dominant blue holographic fish gliding through the center foreground, while an orange counterpart glows in the distance near the PETROCHEM tower above a circular intersection of neon light trails. As the camera tracks the movement, the orange fish swims forward to take the dominant foreground position, its glowing fins filling the frame. The scene then shifts as the blue fish retreats toward the left side of the plaza, maintaining the cyberpunk atmosphere against a backdrop of illuminated glass skyscrapers and flowing traffic.
